name: ATV (Automated Transfer Vehicle)
tagline: ESA's flagship ISS cargo carrier; 5 flights
description: ATV (Automated Transfer Vehicle) is a robotic cargo spacecraft built by Astrium / Airbus in Multi (Europe). ESA's flagship ISS cargo carrier; 5 flights. Retired after first flight in 2008.
best_known_for: ESA's flagship ISS cargo carrier; 5 flights
